calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.'S Notice of Hearing Regarding Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. (Plaintiff's counsel called the Court the day of the hearing informed the Court that there was no proof of service, but did not appear). There are no appearances on this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and the Court rules as follows: the motion is denied. No Proof of Service is provided. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
